understanding.goal_understanding: Navigate a selectable piece (and potentially switch between multiple selectables) through a grid-based level to reach the goal tile(s) within a limited step budget, using movement and object interactions as needed.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each MOVE action shifts the currently selected piece by one cell (3 pixels) in the chosen direction. If a pushable object is immediately adjacent in that direction, it can be pushed along with the selected piece provided the destination space allows it. Walls or boundaries can prevent movement, but the blocked hint is only a heuristic: moves may still succeed or fail depending on the specific wall behavior. Multiple selectable pieces can exist; using CLICK on a selectable’s pixel position instantly transfers control (updates player.id/position) to that piece without moving it through the grid.
